metadata_value: RECeUS-AIC is the primary decision gate
Presence-only tests can upgrade an unsupportive primary gate to equivocal but cannot create supportive status on their own
Xie contradiction can downgrade a supportive primary gate to equivocal but cannot create unsupportive status when the primary gate is equivocal
Maller-Zhou alpha_n is exported as descriptive follow-up context only and is not used in the final decision gate
Self-contained pragmatic approximation to the Hsu sup-score test: bootstrap supremum likelihood-ratio screen over Stage-1 formula branches using a Weibull AFT working latency model.
The Xie sufficient follow-up test is implemented in its no-covariate form only and is used only as a contradiction trigger against a supportive primary gate.
Merged site-adjusted inherits raw-tail Maller-Zhou/Xie/RECeUS metrics from merged site-free, but reruns the HSU working-model branch with site adjustment.
Write all outputs into the single user-specified `export_path` without creating extra subfolders.
